hooks.prompt: Check if the conversation involved code changes (file edits, new files, or bug fixes). If yes, check whether core-docs/history.md or core-docs/plan.md were also updated in this conversation. Return {"ok": true} if documentation was updated or if no code changes were made. Return {"ok": false, "reason": "Code was changed but core-docs were not updated. Documentation is part of done -- update history.md and plan.md before committing."} if code changed but docs weren't touched.

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.env* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *credentials* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *secret* ]]; then echo "Blocked: refusing to write to sensitive file $FILE" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
